name: Oracle Taleo Cloud
description: Fast, easy, affordable talent management solutions that enable workforce quality improving and leadership pipeline building. Learn more about Oracle Taleo Cloud

reviews.review_description: My experience with Taleo was middle of the road. I think it's good enough, I wouldn't tell everyone to buy it but it does the job.
reviews.review_pros: Taleo was the first ATS I used and I thought it was very easy to learn the ins and outs. It wasn't an overly complicated platform and if I needed to find a candidate or process it was very straightforward.
reviews.review_cons: Taleo is not the most robust system. You're not going to get all the bells and whistles and it's not going to be the tool you rave and tell all your friends about, but it gets the job done and it's fairly intuitive. Sourcing for candidates is very difficult though.

reviews.review_pros: Oracle Taleo help you to mentor your team and make your day more easy as keep all report for each one in and out ,and in that way give you the control system on who under your charge, the software help head of department to eliminate paper work to be in one day only as help you in evaluation every person individually
reviews.review_cons: I think the platform is so hard to handle and to know how it's use, and report must be configured at beginning. the implementation maybe be long and hard in beginning , however i think it is worth.

reviews.review_pros: 1. It has a lot of features to support recruitment 2. easy to use and user-friendly 3. highly secure
reviews.review_cons: Tot as innovative in terms of new features and updates compared to some of the newer competitors in the market

reviews.review_description: Great integrations, feature-packed, and makes us more efficient. Highly recommended.
reviews.review_pros: We can keep tabs on applicants. Monitor their progression from initial evaluation, hiring, and building skills. Encompasses just about all of the human resources processes. The price is great for the features you get. We love having the employee paperwork all filled in before a new hire even steps foot into the office for their first day. Nobody likes paperwork. This software definitely improves our onboarding process, making us much more efficient. The integrations also allow our department to save time managing employees. Having things like our background check service integrated is great.
reviews.review_cons: Needs an integration with payroll. Not the easiest software to deal with (it's Oracle...). You'll have that with software that is powerful, though. Still, could use some improvements for ease of use. Navigation could be improved.

reviews.review_description: Even though the initial set up is long, subsequent applications are easy and breezy since all your information is already in there. When I was looking for a job, there were a ton of companies that used this for their application process- a lot of quality companies and positions too!
reviews.review_pros: I loved, loved, loved that it stored my resume and job application information and was easy to submit to multiple positions within individual companies.
reviews.review_cons: The first time you apply to a job listing, it takes SOOOO LONG to enter all the information. Also, each business requires you to re-enter or upload your information, but once it IS in there, you can easily apply to multiple job listings!

reviews.review_pros: I like that all candidate data and metrics are housed in one place.
reviews.review_cons: The tool is not very intuitive and is very hard to navigate and source and search profiles.

reviews.review_description: The system really feels outdated in 2023 and one can feel it while navigating, loading and pulling data.
reviews.review_pros: It was hard for me to tell which feature I liked
reviews.review_cons: speed of data pulling and loading, lack if intuitiveness, filtering

reviews.review_title: I utilize Taleo for full-lifecycle recruiting
reviews.review_description: It captures and organizes a huge number of applicants
reviews.review_pros: Taleo is relatively easy to use and has a broad range of functionality. It is also extremely customizable.
reviews.review_cons: The user experience leaves something to be desired, it feels outdated. Taleo is not particularly intuitive, and needs stronger integration with other HR systems

reviews.review_title: Lots to be desired from end user of performance review
reviews.review_pros: I do like that I can see all the reviews from the cycle online. And being able to track status online too
reviews.review_cons: The formatting for adding comments on performance reviews is not friendly; it allows for text only. There is NO formatting available.

reviews.review_pros: I loved the correctness of its reporting and how easy it is to communicate with the HR through resume submissions. I love the feature of having to accept applicants via the software.
reviews.review_cons: not user-friendly when you want to create reports. Overall it's a good platform, the reporting platform can be overwhelming at times.

reviews.review_description: Have been using this program for several years and find it easy to use.
reviews.review_pros: Fairly easy to use with some tutorials. Customer interaction is seamless.
reviews.review_cons: Some of the overview of HR is not seen on the user interface side and it is sometimes difficult to find errors.

reviews.review_title: Maintain Jobs and position control list, and applicants
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: used to post jobs for the college, review applications, to send offer of employment, and onboard the hires
reviews.review_pros: I liked being able to set-up specific forms for the specific classification of employee. I liked having everything in one place for for the recruitment cycle, the job posting, applications, and the HR forms required after hired to initiate the onboarding process is very nice. You can upload contract and have applicant sign electronically to agree and maintain its records all in one place.
reviews.review_cons: I don't really have any complaints the system was fairly easy to use.

reviews.review_pros: Reporting metrics are helpful but could be more conclusive and could be more filters available. Application information is not easily printable for those that refuse to use a computer to view.
reviews.review_cons: Interface is dreadfully slow, it is built in flash which is outdated and unable to access from apple ipads, iphones which is difficult to manage at career events and providing instant feedback to potential applicants.

reviews.review_title: Easy to use but too pricey to be the best
reviews.review_description: Better value elsewhere if you don't need Oracle Software for recruiting
reviews.review_pros: It is an Oracle product so it implements and snycs with existing software well. Being experienced with other Oracle Software I felt the look of the landing page was positive and it was easy to get around the site!
reviews.review_cons: The Price is very high especially if you want "full features." Felt a little nickled and dimed to get all the features we wanted. Salesman was honest but it was frustrating

reviews.review_pros: fairly configurable, good candidate management options for users. ability to screen and prioritize candidates is helpful.
reviews.review_cons: too few fields for candidates to filter; no option for candidates to 'search', only to choose from drop-down menu,

reviews.review_description: Over all, it is user friendly software and 90% it fulfills customer/users needs.Regarding highlighting of comments and notification, pop up message service shall be in place.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to operate and create log in account supported by admin teams.Easy to find out the processes, identify errors and reply from the relevant department.All notifications are easily accessible and trackable via email support.
reviews.review_cons: Sometime comment or question raised by the line managers in the process are unable to see these are not highlighted properly and no pop up message receives.

reviews.review_pros: The overall product features, and internal candidate search features including excel download.
reviews.review_cons: The speed and user interface, it was very difficult to work on Taleo to perform simplest work like job posting or screen candidates because of slow speed.

reviews.review_pros: easier to use than the previous system. Less system interruptions, less system down time, faster.
reviews.review_cons: I do not have any issues with this software.

reviews.review_pros: I liked the fact that you can use it to manage employees performance and understand how they are doing day to day with the evaluation tools available
reviews.review_cons: I did not like the different pages and the transition from one page to another

reviews.review_title: Overall: I've been using Taleo since 2 years now, and it's the easiest to use and to navigate.
reviews.review_description: As a corporation, we were looking for a recruitment software and candidate management system that could safely store all our business data. Taleo certainly delivers on this front! It's an easy-to-use/user-friendly software with great customer service to back it up. I do recommend this product for businesses with 10-10,000+ employees who are looking for a cost-effective way to manage their recruitment process.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to learn, user-friendly, great functionality and tools, excellent customer service & customer training.
reviews.review_cons: Professional Services work- There is an opportunity to do customization to the product but would suggest waiting to see if needed. Customizations are usually where you will have issues when something breaks. The core product is always working but automations is where you may see failures.

reviews.review_title: oracle excellent program for the support of their databases
reviews.review_pros: the best of oracle, is its massive capacity to contain and create such large databases, reliable and secure
reviews.review_cons: I should have more tools, more accessories

reviews.review_title: Taleo is a great talent acquisiton software. It isn't as flexible as some of the newer technology.
reviews.review_pros: I like the TCC use. Integrating between systems seems to be straightforward and user friendly most of the time.
reviews.review_cons: Paying by headcount rather than by user. We have employees who are not users, no access to system, but we pay for them per the contract.

reviews.review_description: A great product overall… Might be more than you need for a small organization
reviews.review_pros: Looks great- intuitive interface, lots of bells and whistles
reviews.review_cons: Implementation can be confusing if you don’t have professional services

reviews.review_description: Unfortunately, Taleo did not work for our environment as our configuration was not suitable for our recruiting environment. It definitely can handle process and checks/balances in the recruiting workflow but wasn't very dynamic is storing/sorting/cultivating candidates.
reviews.review_pros: Taleo is definitely geared to large enterprises with data storage needs. The integration with financial software is well established.
reviews.review_cons: The architecture is very restrictive. The recruiting software isn't very configurable without patches that may nor may not work. Such a large system does not make changes/updates very often or quickly.

reviews.review_title: Very Detailed and in depth recruiting tool
reviews.review_description: I used this system as a recruiter for a major trucking company -- Taleo is a great product for storing, managing, and reviewing potential recruits. Job postings are simple enough and allow for quite a bit of in depth detail if needed. From the job seeker side, it is a typical long drawn out process to fill out, and it does lack abilities to pull in correct data from Resumes when loaded. That being said, it is still easy enough to navigate and review even from the recruit side.
reviews.review_pros: In depth and very robust in functionality
reviews.review_cons: Does not do a great job of grabbing correct data from uploaded resumes.
